name: Apple Almond Wheat Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté apples, almonds, onion, and celery in butter for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Remove from heat and stir in cinnamon, poultry seasoning, and salt.
3. Combine bread cubes and raisins with the apple mixture. Stir in egg and apple cider; mix well into the bread mixture.
4. If desired, add more cider to achieve a moist texture.
5. Stuff the prepared stuffing into a 15-20 pound turkey or two large roasting chickens.
6. Spoon any remaining stuffing into a lightly greased loaf pan.
7. Bake, covered, for the last 30-40 minutes of roasting.
